3105180.name: Subway Surge
3105180.description:
Subway Surge is a fun endless runner game featuring pirate heroes. Navigate using your mouse, and collect gold coins by running, jumping, and sliding. Help the pirates gather all the gold!

Run through the city, continually updating your high score by collecting coins and power-ups. How far can you run?

In Subway Surge, you'll embark on a thrilling adventure with a crew of daring pirates. As you dash through bustling city streets, you'll need to dodge obstacles, leap over barriers, and slide under tight spaces. The vibrant graphics and fast-paced gameplay will keep you on the edge of your seat.

  • FEATURES:
  • Stunning environments
  • New and challenging obstacles
  • Additional power-ups
  • Unique abilities for each character
  • Heart-racing gameplay
